label: Palestinians Killed (Gaza)
source: Gaza Ministry of Health / UN OCHA / WAFA
contestNote: Israel disputes figures, argues Hamas fighters counted as civilians. Cumulative total since Oct 7, 2023; plus 14,222 missing/presumed dead under rubble. Lancet Mortality Survey (Mar 2026) estimates 75,200 violent deaths through Jan 5, 2025 — 34.7% higher than MoH for same period

label: Palestinians Wounded (Gaza)
contestNote: Figures may undercount due to overwhelmed health system; +37 injured Feb 26–Mar 5

label: Displaced Palestinians
contestNote: ~90% of Gaza's 2.1M population displaced at peak

label: Hostages Remaining in Gaza
source: Hostages and Missing Families Forum / IDF
contestNote: All 251 hostages accounted for by Jan 26, 2026: ~105 released Nov 2023 truce, 33 in Phase 1 (Jan 2025), 20 alive + 28 bodies in Oct 2025 deal, remainder died in captivity or rescued

label: Structures Destroyed/Damaged in Gaza
contestNote: By late 2024, est. 60% of all structures damaged or destroyed

label: Aid Trucks Entering Gaza (daily avg)
contestNote: Israel closed all crossings Feb 28, 2026; Kerem Shalom sole cargo crossing as of Mar 29. UNDP shipments suspended Mar 25 after engine oil found in crates. Rafah crossing reopened briefly Mar 19 for medical evacuations; constrained again by late March. 37 humanitarian orgs suspended Dec 2025 (IRC, MSF, Mercy Corps, NRC, DCI). ICJ ordered Israel (Mar 22) to ensure basic needs are met and support UNRWA operations. 46% of essential medicines out of stock; 66% surgical consumables out of stock. 2026 Flash Appeal $4.1B req, 93% unfunded.

label: Healthcare Facilities Damaged/Destroyed
contestNote: All 36 hospitals in Gaza damaged or destroyed; ~16 partially functional at peak

label: Population at IPC Phase 5 (Catastrophe) Risk
contestNote: Israel disputes famine characterization; 37 humanitarian organizations suspended by Israel Dec 2025; ICJ ordered Israel (Mar 22) to ensure basic needs are met and support UN/UNRWA relief; 2026 Flash Appeal $4.1B req, 7.2% funded as of late March
